home.title: Home
home.noApps: No apps available. Contact an administrator.

login.title: Sign In
login.description: Enter your username or email and password to sign in
login.nameSuggestion: Login by name is no longer supported. Did you mean: {usernames}?

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailSentDescription: If an account with this email exists, we have sent you a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.invalidLinkDescription: The password reset link is invalid or expired.
resetPassword.noToken: No token found. Please request a new link.
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.resetFailed: Password could not be reset. The link might have expired.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.identityRequired: Please enter your username or email
validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 3 characters long
validation.nameRegex: Name must not contain any of the following characters: "(),=<>
validation.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters long
validation.usernameRegex: Only letters, numbers, _ and - are allowed
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters long
validation.newPasswordDifferent: New password must be different from the current one

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.emailNotEditable: The email address cannot be changed here. A separate process for changing the email will be offered later.

form.updateFailed: The profile could not be updated.

profile.primaryGroupHint: Must be one of your member groups.

password.setNewDescription: Enter your current password and then a new password.
password.changedDescription: Your password has been successfully changed.
password.changeFailed: Password could not be changed. Please check your current password.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.description: All changes and actions in the system

sync.title: Sync Status
sync.description: Status of synchronization with LDAP and Discourse

invite.subject: Invitation to {platformName}
invite.mainText: You have been invited to create an account for the {platformName} platform. Click the button below to accept the invitation.
invite.footer: If you did not expect this invitation, you can ignore this email.
invite.footerHelp: If you have questions about using the platform, check the help section or send us an email.
invite.disclaimer: This email was automatically generated via {appUrl}.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your password – {platformName}
passwordReset.mainText: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to set a new password.
passwordReset.footer: If you did not request a password reset, you can ignore this email.
passwordReset.footerHelp: If you have questions, feel free to send us an email.
passwordReset.disclaimer: This email was automatically generated via {appUrl}.

general.title: General settings
general.description: Platform name, logo and support email (e.g. for emails and footers).
general.logoUploadHelp: PNG, JPEG, SVG or WebP, max 2MB
general.themeColorHelp: Choose a primary color for the platform's theme.
general.dashboardDescriptionPlaceholder: Short text shown below the title

templates.title: Email templates
templates.description: Customise texts for invite and password reset emails (per language)
templates.subject: Subject

categories.title: Categories
categories.name: Name
categories.notConfigured: Discourse is not configured. Set DISCOURSE_URL and API credentials in environment.
categories.fetchError: Failed to load categories from Discourse.
categories.groupPermissionsHint: Groups that can see this category; empty = everyone

deleteConfirm.title: Delete category?
deleteConfirm.description: Category "{name}" and its subcategories will be removed from Discourse. This cannot be undone.

apps.title: Apps
apps.name: Name
apps.oidcRedirectUrisHint: JSON array of allowed redirect URIs. If empty, App URL + /auth/callback is used.
apps.oidcClientSecretHint: Leave empty for public clients (e.g. SPAs with PKCE).

deleteConfirm.title: Delete app?
deleteConfirm.description: The app "{name}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

apps.iconHint: Square image (PNG, JPG, SVG, WebP), max 2MB
apps.logoHint: Displayed on the home screen, max 2MB
apps.imagesHint: Icon and logo for the app

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage all users in the system
users.allUsersDescription: A list of all registered users with their group memberships
users.name: Name

form.createdDescription: The user has been successfully created.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete user?
deleteConfirm.description: The user "{name}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

users.groupOwnershipHint: Groups where this user has admin rights
users.primaryGroupHint: Must be one of the user's member groups.

form.emailNotSent: Email could not be sent (check SMTP).
form.resentDescription: The invitation email has been resent.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete invite?
deleteConfirm.description: The invitation for "{email}" will be permanently deleted.

acceptInvite.title: Accept Invitation
acceptInvite.name: Name
acceptInvite.successDescription: Account created. You can now sign in.
acceptInvite.primaryGroupHint: Must be one of your member groups.

groups.title: Groups
groups.allGroupsDescription: A list of all groups with member count and hierarchy
groups.name: Name

form.createdDescription: The group has been successfully created.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete group?
deleteConfirm.description: The group "{name}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

groups.parentGroupsHint: Select groups that should contain this group
groups.childGroupsHint: Select groups that should be contained by this group
groups.ownerAddedDescription: The user now has admin rights in this group.
groups.ownerRemovedDescription: Admin rights have been removed. The user remains a member.
groups.addMemberDescription: Select user and add to group
groups.memberAddedDescription: The user has been added to the group.
groups.memberRemovedDescription: The member has been removed from the group.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 3 characters
validation.slugMin: Slug must be at least 3 characters
